calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-20-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-20-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge Bruce E. Chan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Francisco A. Gutierrez, Esq. appeared for Juanita L. Smallwood, who was not present at today's hearing.
Gwen Smallwood, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Edward Smallwood, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendants Kevin Smallwood or Craig Smallwood.
Default was entered against defendant Kevin Smallwood March 30, 2009.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on April 1, 2009.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, April 20, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Juanita L. Smallwood, and against defendants Kevin smallwood, Craig Smallwood as follows:

Holdover Damages - $15,189.00.
Costs - $430.00.00.
Total - $15,619.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Juanita L. Smallwood is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1415 Shafter Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94124.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2009 Off Calendar

Ntc And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions Of Deft And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Francisco A. Gutierrez, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Juanita M. Smallwood

No other appearance, After hearing, Plaintiff Juanita Smallwood's Motion for order establishing admissions of defendant Craig Smallwood granted in full.
Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of the date of service of this order.
Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Intergatories (Set One), Specially Prepared Interrogatories (Set One), Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Craig Smallwood For Failure To Respond For Failure To Respond To Discovery;
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Francisco A. Gutierrez, for Plaintiff and moving party: Juanita Smallwood

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted as modified.
1. Plaintiff Juanita Smallwood's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One), Specially Prepared Interrogatories (Set One), Request For Production Of Documents (Set One), granted as follows:
a. All objections are waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Within FIVE days of the date of service of this order, defendants Kevin Smallwood and Craig Smallwood each shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's Form Interrogatories (Set One), Specially Prepared Interrogatories (Set One), Request For Production Of Documents (Set One);
2. Request For Monetary Sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, to run jointly against the defendants. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Demurrer Of Deft To Complaint Of Pltf Juanita L. Smallwood; Demurrer; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Feb-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CRAIG SMALLWOOD'S Demurrer to Complaint of Plaintiff, Juanita L. Smallwood. Appearances: Gwen Smallwood (not a party), sister of Defendant Craig Smallwood, appearing. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained. No opposition filed. Five days leave to amend. Order signed at ex parte hearing this date. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
